name: Rolled Chicken Tacos
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Rinse chicken breasts and place in a casserole dish.
3. Pour salsa over chicken, cover, and bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
4. Cool the baked chicken. Shred the chicken and return it to the sauce.
5. Reheat when ready to use.
6. Place about 1/2 cup of shredded mixture in a warmed corn tortilla and roll it up.
7. Serve on a bed of shredded lettuce.
Nutrition Analysis per serving: 297 cal; 27gm pro; 32gm carb; 12gm fat; 100mg sod; 62mg chol. Serving Size: 2 rolled tacos.
